untranslatable_reason: The signal requires computing normalized deviation as (price - MA) / StdDev and using that exact value as position sizing. The allowed indicator list does not include a standard deviation indicator or a normalized z-score indicator. Additionally, dynamic position sizing based on computed deviations cannot be expressed as binary entry/exit conditions using only the allowed operators and indicators. The signal also has missing critical parameters (lookback_period, threshold marked as AUTHOR_SILENT) needed to operationalize the mean reversion logic.
translation_notes: Signal describes a linear mean reversion strategy with dynamic position sizing based on normalized deviations from a moving average. Without StdDev indicator and with missing parameter specifications, full translation is not possible. A simplified proxy using price crossing its moving average has been provided as a fallback, but this does not capture the core logic of the original signal (negative normalized deviation weighting).
